data.name: Page_Calendar_Agenda_Empty
data.value: No upcoming events in the next 7 days.

data.name: Page_Home_ReadyMadeTextsToUse_Text
data.value: ready-made texts and ideas to use

data.name: Page_Home_AdvertisSection_Text
data.value: Everything you need to create perfect content – ​​in one place

data.name: Page_Home_MyPremiumPostsSection_NoPostsExists_Text
data.value: No posts yet. Create your first!

data.name: Page_Home_DailySchedule_Empty_Text
data.value: Click "Add Activity" to start planning your day

data.name: Page_Samples_SubTitle
data.value: Samples of components on the webpage

data.name: Page_Landing_Title
data.value: Create content with clarity, calm, and purpose

data.name: Page_Landing_Subtitle
data.value: Contista helps you plan, create, and reuse content in a creative, structured, and sustainable way.

data.name: Page_Landing_Feature1_Text
data.value: Create content that aligns with your brand, your goals, and your energy — not just today’s trends.

data.name: Page_Landing_Feature2_Text
data.value: Organize weeks, themes, and content pillars so you always know what to create — and why.

data.name: Page_Landing_Feature3_Text
data.value: Save ideas, texts, hooks, and strategies in one system. Reuse, refine, and build when it suits you.

data.name: Page_Landing_LoginCard_Subtitle
data.value: Access your content system and continue where you left off.

data.name: Page_LoginCard_FailedToLogin_Error
data.value: Fail to login. Wrong email or password.

data.name: Page_Landing_Hero_Title
data.value: A calm start — with full control of your content.

data.name: Page_Landing_Hero_Subtitle
data.value: Plan weeks, build content pillars, and store ideas in one place. Create more — stress less.

data.name: Page_Landing_Hero_CtaSubtitle
data.value: Create an account, or explore features first.

data.name: SyncDebug_Offline_AutoSyncWhenOnline
data.value: Offline – sync runs automatically when you go online.

data.name: SyncDebug_SelectRealPost
data.value: Select a real record (not temp/pending create).

data.name: SyncDebug_PostNotFoundInUi
data.value: Could not find the entry in the UI list.

data.name: Page_NotFound_SubTitel
data.value: Sorry, the content you are looking for does not exist.

data.name: Page_UpgradeRequired_SubTitle
data.value: This feature requires a higher subscription or a one-time purchase.

data.name: Page_Home_FeatureCardGate_Hooks_Text
data.value: Hooks & CTAs are included in Premium.

data.name: Page_OnlineRequired_Message
data.value: This page requires internet. Please turn on the internet and try again.

data.name: Page_OfflineStatusBanner_Offline_Title
data.value: You are offline. Some features are not available.

data.name: Page_OfflineStatusBanner_Status_Text
data.value: Offline – connect to the internet to log in

data.name: Page_OfflineStatusBanner_ComputeMessage_2
data.value: Changes are queued until you are online.

data.name: Page_FeatureCardGate_Message
data.value: This feature is not included in your plan.

data.name: Page_LoginCard_NotOnline_Text
data.value: You are offline. Please turn on the internet and try again.

data.name: Page_Home_FeatureGate_OfflineMessage
data.value: This feature requires internet. Turn on the internet and try again.

data.name: Page_Home_FeatureGate_NotLoggedInMessage
data.value: You need to be logged in to use this feature.

data.name: Page_CreateRole_SubTitle
data.value: Create a new role in the system

data.name: Page_CreateMembership_SubTitle
data.value: Create a membership in the system

data.name: Page_SyncDebug_NetworkPanel_DebugOverrideIsNotSupported_Text
data.value: Debug override is not supported on this host (IsSupported=false).

data.name: Page_TodaysFocusSection_Add_Subtitle
data.value: Create a new task for today.

data.name: Page_TodaysFocusSection_Add_Field_Icon_Hint
data.value: Use a Bootstrap icon class, e.g. bi-bullseye

data.name: Page_TodaysFocusSection_Add_Field_Link_Hint
data.value: Optional. If set, the row becomes a link.

data.name: Page_TodaysFocusSection_Add_Field_Icon_PickerHint
data.value: Click an icon to use it.

data.name: Page_UpcomingContentSection_Empty
data.value: No content yet. Create one to get started.

data.name: Page_WeekAtAGlanceSection_NoAgendaForDay_Text
data.value: No agenda items for this day.

data.name: Page_DreamCustomerSection_Hint
data.value: Tap a dream client to view details

data.name: Page_ContentPillarsSection_Hint
data.value: Tap a pillar to view details

data.name: Page_Landing_LoginCard_FailedToLogin_Error
data.value: Failed to log in. Incorrect email address or password.

data.name: Page_Calendar_Subtitle
data.value: Plan, track and create events for your content.

data.name: Page_Calendar_Error_Generic
data.value: Something went wrong while loading the calendar.

data.name: Page_Calendar_Empty_Body
data.value: Click a day or a timeslot to add an event.

data.name: Invites_Error_Generic
data.value: Could not complete invite action right now. Please try again.

data.name: Invites_Error_Offline
data.value: You must be online to manage invites.

data.name: Invites_Error_Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to manage invites for this calendar.

data.name: Invites_Error_Unauthorized
data.value: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: Invites_Error_NotFound
data.value: This invite is no longer available.

data.name: Invites_Offline_Info
data.value: You must be online to accept or decline invites.

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_DeleteConfirm_Text
data.value: Do you want to move events to another calendar or delete everything?

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_DeleteConfirm_TargetRequired
data.value: Select a target calendar (or choose 'Delete all').

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_DeleteConfirm_DeleteOption
data.value: Delete the calendar and all events (cannot be undone)

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_DeleteConfirm_MoveOption
data.value: Move all events to another calendar and delete this calendar

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_DeleteConfirm_NoTarget
data.value: No other calendar exists. (Create a new calendar if you want to move events.)

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_Members_LoadError
data.value: Could not load members for this calendar.

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_Members_Offline
data.value: You must be online to remove a member.

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_Members_ReadOnly
data.value: You can view members here, but you need share permission to edit roles or remove members.

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_PrimaryLocked
data.value: Contista calendar is always available and cannot be edited here.

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_SubTitle
data.value: Edit name/color or delete an extra calendar

data.name: Page_CalendarShareModal_Email_Hint
data.value: The recipient must already have an account.

data.name: Page_CalendarShareModal_Invite_Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to share this calendar.

data.name: Page_CalendarShareModal_Invite_GenericError
data.value: Could not send invite right now. Please try again.

data.name: Page_CalendarShareModal_Invite_Unauthorized
data.value: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: Page_CalendarShareModal_Invite_UserNotFound
data.value: No user found with that email address.

data.name: Page_CalendarShareModal_Offline
data.value: You must be online to share calendars.

data.name: Page_Calendar_CreateCalendar_QueuedOffline
data.value: Calendar queued offline. It will be created when you are back online.

data.name: Page_Calendar_DeleteCalendar_MoveRequiresTarget
data.value: To move events you must select a target calendar.

data.name: Page_Calendar_DeleteCalendar_QueuedOffline
data.value: Calendar deletion queued offline. It will sync when you are back online.

data.name: Page_Calendar_DeleteTemp_Disabled
data.value: This event is still a temporary offline item. Delete is disabled until it has synced and received a real EventId.

data.name: Page_Calendar_MaxExtraCalendars_Info
data.value: You cannot create more extra calendars.

data.name: Page_Calendar_PrimaryCannotDelete
data.value: The primary (Contista) calendar cannot be deleted.

data.name: Page_Calendar_PrimaryCannotEdit
data.value: The primary (Contista) calendar cannot be edited.

data.name: Page_Calendar_QueuedOffline_Info
data.value: Saved offline. It will sync when you are back online.

data.name: Page_Calendar_Share_Disabled_Feature
data.value: Calendar sharing requires a paid membership.

data.name: Page_Calendar_Share_Disabled_NoPermission
data.value: You don't have permission to share any calendar.

data.name: Page_Calendar_Share_Disabled_Offline
data.value: You must be online to share calendars.

data.name: Page_Calendar_UpdateCalendar_QueuedOffline
data.value: Changes queued offline. They will sync when you are back online.

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_PrimaryColorLocked
data.value: Contista calendar uses the primary color and cannot be changed.

data.name: Page_CalendarQuickAddModal_NoEditableCalendars
data.value: You don't have permission to create events in any calendar.

data.name: ConfirmModal_Message_UnsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to discard them?

data.name: Common_Recurrence_OccurrenceLocked
data.value: This is a single occurrence. Edit the series from the original event.

data.name: Page_Calendar_Filter_Guard
data.value: At least one calendar must be visible. Showing the primary calendar.

data.name: Page_CalendarEventModal_EditThisEvent
data.value: This instance only (deviation in the series)

data.name: Common_ConfirmModel_Delete_Message
data.value: Are you sure your want to delete this?

data.name: Page_Calendar_Agenda_EmptyDay
data.value: No events. Click to add one.

data.name: Common_Location_LinkHint
data.value: This will be treated as a link.

data.name: Common_Location_MapHint
data.value: This will be treated as a map location.

data.name: Page_CalendarShareModal_Invite_Sent_WithEmail
data.value: Invite sent to {0} and is now pending.

data.name: Invites_RefreshFailed_Info_Accept
data.value: The invitation was accepted, but the calendar view could not be updated right now.

data.name: Invites_RefreshFailed_Info_Decline
data.value: The invitation was declined, but the calendar view could not be updated right now.

data.name: Page_CalendarManageModal_RemoveMemberConfirm_Text
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the calendar?
